title: HOW MANY DIGITS DO I HAVE

content.problemStatement: Write a program to obtain a number $(N)$ from the user and display whether the number is a one digit number, 2 digit number, 3 digit number or more than 3 digit number
content.inputFormat: First line will contain the number $N$,
content.outputFormat:
Print "1" if N is a 1 digit number.

Print "2" if N is a 2 digit number.

Print "3" if N is a 3 digit number.

Print "More than 3 digits" if N has more than 3 digits.
